positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration featuring a stylized astronaut floating through a nebula of blooming bioluminescent flora. The astronaut should have clean, simple lines and a retro-futuristic aesthetic, depicted against a deep indigo and sapphire background streaked with vibrant teal and violet nebulae clouds. The composition must be centrally balanced, with the astronaut acting as the main focal point and the flora organically framing the edges. Use strong silhouettes and dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, emphasizing the glow of the bioluminescence. Vector art style with high contrast and perfect symmetry. Designed for apparel print quality.
